#aiart #promptshare
Title: "Cozy Crate: Where Puppies Dream"
Style: Warm, golden-hour lighting creating a cozy, nostalgic mood
Prompt in ALT

images.alt: A heartwarming photograph of a tiny Jack Russell Terrier puppy sleeping peacefully in a weathered wooden crate filled with golden straw. The puppy displays classic white and brown markings, with eyes gently closed and one adorable paw dangling over the crate's edge, mouth slightly open in deep, content slumber. The rustic wooden crate sits on a straw-scattered barn floor, surrounded by visible wooden beams and farm fencing that fade into a soft bokeh background. Warm golden sunlight streams through a multi-paned window on the right, casting a nostalgic glow over the scene and highlighting the rich amber and cream tones of the pastoral setting.

A heartwarming photograph of a tiny Jack Russell Terrier puppy sleeping peacefully in a weathered wooden crate filled with golden straw. The puppy displays classic white and brown markings, with eyes gently closed and one adorable paw dangling over the crate's edge, mouth slightly open in deep, content slumber. record.text:
#aiart #promptshare
Title: "Breakfast with a Billion-Dollar Backdrop"
Style: Lifestyle/travel photography with elements of food photography and landscape photography combined
Prompt in ALT

images.alt: A professional lifestyle photograph of an elaborate Mexican feast arranged on a rustic wooden dining table on an outdoor deck. The table showcases three soft-shell tacos on a wooden board, huevos rancheros on a white plate, a bowl of dark charro beans garnished with green peppers, fresh tortillas in a woven basket, and two tall glasses of vibrant orange juice positioned at opposite ends. Small bowls of guacamole, salsa, and rice complete the colorful spread, all captured with tack-sharp focus and rich color saturation. Beyond the wooden railing, a breathtaking mountain vista unfolds with a winding river cutting through lush evergreen forests, leading to snow-capped peaks under a brilliant azure sky streaked with wispy cirrus clouds, creating perfect atmospheric perspective in the bright natural daylight.

A professional lifestyle photograph of an elaborate Mexican feast arranged on a rustic wooden dining table on an outdoor deck. The table showcases three soft-shell tacos on a wooden board, huevos rancheros on a white plate, a bowl of dark charro beans garnished with green peppers, fresh tortillas in a woven basket, and two tall glasses of vibrant orange juice positioned at opposite ends. Small bowls of guacamole, salsa, and rice complete the colorful spread, all captured with tack-sharp focus and rich color saturation. Beyond the wooden railing, a breathtaking mountain vista unfolds with a winding river cutting through lush evergreen forests, leading to snow-capped peaks under a brilliant azure sky streaked with wispy cirrus clouds, creating perfect atmospheric perspective in the bright natural daylight.

record.text:
#aiart #promptshare
Title: "Guardians of the Fjell Stream"
Style: Scandinavian folk art meets contemporary illustration, influenced by Theodor Kittelsen's troll paintings
Prompt in ALT

images.alt: A Scandinavian folk art illustration depicting two gentle forest trolls with moss-covered bark-like skin sitting peacefully on smooth granite river stones beside a crystal-clear mountain stream. One massive troll cups sparkling water in his weathered hands, bringing it to his lips, while his companion watches tiny silver fish dart playfully between polished pebbles in the shallow current. The scene is framed by towering Norwegian pines whose ancient branches filter soft golden hour sunlight, casting dappled patterns across the trolls' kind, weathered faces and creating warm highlights that dance on the water's surface. The composition evokes the timeless serenity of Nordic folklore, where these gentle giants serve as eternal guardians of the wild places, rendered in the style of Theodor Kittelsen's classic troll paintings with contemporary illustration techniques.

A Scandinavian folk art illustration depicting two gentle forest trolls with moss-covered bark-like skin sitting peacefully on smooth granite river stones beside a crystal-clear mountain stream. One massive troll cups sparkling water in his weathered hands, bringing it to his lips, while his companion watches tiny silver fish dart playfully between polished pebbles in the shallow current. The scene is framed by towering Norwegian pines whose ancient branches filter soft golden hour sunlight, casting dappled patterns across the trolls' kind, weathered faces and creating warm highlights that dance on the water's surface. The composition evokes the timeless serenity of Nordic folklore, where these gentle giants serve as eternal guardians of the wild places, rendered in the style of Theodor Kittelsen's classic troll paintings with contemporary illustration techniques.

external.description: 地球はトーラスだった。  上部の穴は夜空の星々を、下部の穴は深海の逆さ銀河を映す。地上はその間の、薄い膜のような世界。人間たちはその膜の上で、火を起こし、街を築き、空を見上げては「宇宙は広大だ」と語り合っていた。深海の最深部、マリアナ海溝のさらに奥。  そこに一匹のタコがいた。名前はない。ただ、半開きの瞳で静かに世界を眺めている。  そのタコは、銀河規模の高次元意識の化身だった。短い寿命の体を何度...

今日、突然、自分のホームが、エラーで見えなくなりました。
先月の、アカウントが永久停止された日を、思い出しました。
またかもしれない、と思って、不安で、涙が出ました。

サーバーの不具合だったようです。本当に良かったです。良くはないですけれども…。

もう二度と、あのような悲しいことに、ならないでほしいです。

こんにちは！ いつも、ありがとうございます！

""We're just going in circles, aren't we?""📖
「「同じことの繰り返しだね、私たち。」」

👩‍🏫 Iris's Note:
Going in circles" 「同じ場所をぐるぐる回る」こと

代わり映えのしない日常や、マンネリ化した二人の関係を指しているわ。でも、今夜の「円」はいつもよりずっと深く、螺旋を描くようにあなたを絡めとっていくつもりよ。抜け出せない快楽のループへ、一緒に行きましょう？

#Shungorou #Iris #AIart #AIillustration #AIイラスト #EnglishStudy

images.alt: AI-generated illustration (Stable Diffusion / Illustrious). ""We're just going in circles, aren't we?""
AI-generated illustration (Stable Diffusion / Illustrious). ""We're just going in circles, aren't we?""

record.text:
""I think my feelings are leaking out.""📖
「「気持ちが、ちょっと漏れちゃいそう。」」

👩‍🏫 Iris's Note:
"Leaking out" 「漏れちゃうこと」

ただの言葉じゃなくて、抑えていた熱い衝動が身体の奥から溢れ出してしまう感覚。あなたを前にして、もう理性という名のダムが壊れかけているの。心も、そしてもっと別の場所も……。ねえ、私の全部、受け止めてくれる？

#Shungorou #Iris #AIart #AIillustration #AIイラスト #EnglishStudy

images.alt: AI-generated illustration (Stable Diffusion / Illustrious). ""I think my feelings are leaking out.""
AI-generated illustration (Stable Diffusion / Illustrious). ""I think my feelings are leaking out.""

record.text:
""If you're not serious, don't even bother.""📖
「「中途半端なら、何やったって無駄だよ。」」

👩‍🏫 Iris's Note:
"Serious" 「本気・真剣」

仕事も遊びも、全力で向き合わないと何も手に入らないわ。君のその視線、ただの同僚としてのもの？ それとも……。私のガードを壊したいなら、中途半端な覚悟じゃ火傷するわよ。私の『本気』、受け止める自信はある？

#Shungorou #Iris #AIart #AIillustration #AIイラスト #EnglishStudy

images.alt: High-end fashion editorial of a confident woman walking through a luxury airport. She wears a fitted white “First Class Diva” t-shirt in a rough, bold font—slightly distressed with small rips, frayed edges, and subtle dirt marks—paired with sleek black leather pants and oversized black designer sunglasses. Her hair is voluminous, glossy, and softly waved. She’s captured mid-sip from a takeaway coffee, pulling a black rolling carry-on suitcase. Shot candid, paparazzi-style with shallow depth of field, soft bokeh airport background, motion blur, and glowing terminal lights. Soft natural lighting highlights leather texture, hair shine, and skin. Captured on a high-end DSLR with cinematic color grading, soft focus edges, and fashion magazine quality.

images.alt: A richly detailed, nostalgic illustration in the style of Norman Rockwell shows a busy airport TSA security line, with a frustrated adult male passenger in the foreground standing beside a table where his belongings—clothes, toiletries, electronics, and personal items—are scattered in a messy pile from an open travel bag; he gestures with raised hands and an exasperated “Come on!” expression, while across from him a focused female TSA agent in uniform methodically inspects each item, as a bustling terminal scene with waiting travelers, conveyor belts, bins, and signage fades softly into the background, all rendered with warm painterly lighting, expressive faces, subtle humor, and balanced square composition in a vintage Americana tone.
